meta.title: Aakash Shah — Applied AI / Forward-Deployed Engineer
meta.description: Aakash Shah builds LLM systems that survive contact with production — Senior AI Engineer at MiniMed, five years of applied AI across Medtronic Diabetes and MiniMed, clinical-AI compliance tooling, and agent-reliability research.
meta.ogDescription: AI that survives contact with production. Senior AI Engineer at MiniMed; applied AI across Medtronic Diabetes and MiniMed, ClinicSentry, StressBench.

hero.title: AI that survives *contact with production.*
hero.lede: I build LLM systems for places where a wrong answer costs something — **clinical workflows, compliance, live operations**. Five years of it in diabetes tech — at Medtronic, and now at **MiniMed as a Senior AI Engineer** — taking ambiguous, regulated problems end-to-end, from the first prototype to the audit trail.

contact.heading: Deploy me *somewhere hard.*
contact.pitch: I'm looking for forward-deployed and applied AI roles where the model meets messy reality — regulated data, live users, systems that must not fail quietly. If that's your product, I'd like to hear about it.

footer.left: © {year} Aakash Shah — content in JSON, design in a template, no frameworks, no trackers
